ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active or not */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assessment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assessment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was created */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the assessment */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_tags" (
  "knowledge_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the knowledge tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the knowledge tag */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject associated with the knowledge tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the knowledge tag */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the knowledge tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("knowledge_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_items" (
  "assessment_item_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each assessment item */,
  "assessment_id" TEXT /* Reference to the assessment this item belongs to */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., question, task) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the assessment item */,
  "knowledge_tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the knowledge tag associated with this item */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points assigned to the assessment item */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct answer for the assessment item */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the assessment item */,
  "reference_material" TEXT /* Additional reference materials for the assessment item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_items_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the progress is tracked */,
  "assessment_id" TEXT /* ID of the assessment the user is progressing through */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score obtained by the user in the assessment */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assessment is completed or not */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user started the assessment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user completed the assessment */,
  "number_of_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the user for the assessment */,
  "last_attempt_date" TEXT /* Date of the last attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the report is generated */,
  "assessment_id" TEXT /* ID of the assessment related to the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "assessment_id" TEXT /* ID of the assessment related to the feedback */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., scale of 1-5) */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been read by the relevant authority */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feedback */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)
